author: CasaOS Team
description: Ombi is a self-hosted web application that automatically gives your shared Plex or Emby users the ability to request content by themselves! Ombi can be linked to multiple TV Show and Movie DVR tools to create a seamless end-to-end experience for your users.
tagline: Friendly media request tool, automatically syncs with your media servers!
releaseNotes:
- Ombi v4.47.1 is the upstream release used by this image and publishes Linux, macOS, and Windows artifacts on GitHub.
- The GitHub Release body for v4.47.1 is empty, so no feature or fix notes are available for this exact tag.
title: Ombi
